variant: build me a full skincare starter guide: a product table, a timeline, a checklist, and key stats

request.message: build me a full skincare starter guide: a product table, a timeline, a checklist, and key stats

response_body.response:
**your oily-skin starter routine:**

1. **cleanse** — removes oil buildup so actives reach skin. morning + night.
2. **niacinamide** — controls sebum and shrinks pore appearance. once daily (start pm).
3. **sunscreen** — blocks uv damage and prevents oiliness from worsening. am only, non-negotiable.
4. **moisturizer** — locks hydration; prevents rebound oil. pm only.

start here. one active (niacinamide). no acids, no retinoids yet. your barrier needs time.

---

products.name: CeraVe Foaming Facial Cleanser
products.description: Foaming yet non-stripping — for oily/acne-prone skin types.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: Beauty of Joseon Relief Sun Rice + Probiotic SPF 50+ PA++++
products.description: Cosmetic-elegant Asian SPF — chemical filters, no white cast.

products.name: The Ordinary Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
products.description: Azelaic acid for redness, PIH, and mild rosacea — pregnancy-safe.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

steps.label: week 1–2
steps.detail: skin may feel slightly dry as barrier adjusts. stick with the routine. no new products yet.

steps.label: week 3–4
steps.detail: oiliness stabilizes. pores look slightly refined. if skin is calm, you can add a second product (optional: gentle exfoliant 1x/week).

steps.label: week 5–6
steps.detail: first visible refinement in texture. skin feels more balanced. this is when you lock in the habit.

steps.label: week 7–8
steps.detail: clearer, more even skin tone. you can assess if you need actives beyond niacinamide (e.g., azelaic acid for redness if it develops).

items: grab the cerave foaming cleanser — non-stripping, designed for oily skin
get the ordinary niacinamide 10% + zinc — controls sebum, affordable
pick the beauty of joseon spf 50+ — no white cast, elegant finish
use cleanser twice daily (morning shower, before bed)
apply niacinamide to clean, dry skin at night; wait 60 seconds before moisturizer
use moisturizer every night (even oily skin needs it — prevents rebound oil)
apply spf every morning, 15 min before leaving the house
don't add anything else for 4 weeks — let your skin adapt
